title: CS Flashcards
description: A spaced repetition PWA for mastering CS fundamentals and acing coding interviews — built on cognitive science, not cramming.
highlights: Motivated by Ebbinghaus's forgetting curve: without review, ~90% of new knowledge is lost within a week
Spaced repetition learners retain 82% vs 27% for crammers — 3× better recall with 30–40% less study time
Ships with 1,792 pre-seeded cards from Coding Interview University covering algorithms, data structures, OS, and networking
FSRS algorithm (superior to Anki's SM-2) adapts card intervals to your personal learning patterns
Cross-device sync via Supabase, offline support as a PWA, and 30-day review history dashboard

title: Personal Portfolio Website
description: My personal portfolio website, built with Astro and Tailwind CSS. Designed to showcase my experience, projects, and interests with a modern aesthetic and smooth animations.

title: Electronic Health Records
description: Built a full-stack electronic health records system using Python and Flask, enabling clinics to digitise patient records and streamline appointment management. Implemented secure authentication and role-based access control for healthcare providers.
